name: gistlist
description: Lets Claude find and read meetings from your Mac's own Gistlist library, using your Claude subscription.
long_description:
Gistlist is a local-first meeting workspace. This extension lets Claude find and read meetings from your Mac's own library. Discovery uses your local SQLite + sqlite-vec hybrid index; the full transcripts are handed to Claude so the model can reason over them.

The extension itself makes no outbound network calls beyond your local Ollama instance, which is used for search embeddings. Meeting content you ask about travels to Anthropic's API as part of the Claude conversation, the same way any text you type into Claude does; that's governed by your own Anthropic privacy settings.

If Ollama isn't running, retrieval degrades cleanly to keyword search. The Gistlist app does not need to be running for Claude to query your meetings.

tools.name: list_recent_meetings
tools.description: Lists meetings filtered by participant, date range, or status.

tools.name: search_meetings
tools.description: Hybrid keyword + semantic search across the user's meetings.

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Returns the full markdown body for one meeting.

gistlist_config_dir.title: Gistlist config directory
gistlist_config_dir.description: The folder Gistlist uses for its database and config. Defaults to ~/.gistlist.

ollama_url.title: Ollama base URL
ollama_url.description: Local Ollama endpoint used for semantic search embeddings. Leave at the default unless you've changed Ollama's port.
